all.en: Internal Announcement: Revised Petty Cash Reimbursement Procedure Effective February 1st
all.zh: 內部公告：小額採購報銷流程修訂自 2 月 1 日起施行

all.en: Issued by: Administrative Services Department, Office Operations Division
all.zh: 發布單位：行政服務處辦公室維運部

all.en: To: All Employees Across Domestic and Regional Offices
all.zh: 致：國內及各區辦公室全體同仁

all.en: This announcement supersedes the petty cash guidelines issued in March 2023.
all.zh: 本公告取代 2023 年 3 月所發布之小額採購指引。

all.en: The updated procedure aligns with current internal control recommendations.
all.zh: 更新後之流程符合現行內部控制建議。

all.en: It also incorporates feedback collected from the recent operational survey.
all.zh: 亦納入近期維運問卷所蒐集之意見。

all.en: Please read the revised policy carefully and adjust your practices accordingly.
all.zh: 敬請詳閱修訂後政策並據以調整作業方式。

all.en: Section A: Eligible Expenses and Categorical Definitions
all.zh: A 節：可受理費用及類別定義

all.en: Petty cash covers minor work-related purchases below 200 dollars per transaction.
all.zh: 小額採購適用於每筆 200 美元以下之工作相關支出。

all.en: Typical examples include office supplies, postage, and minor refreshments.
all.zh: 常見項目包括辦公用品、郵資及小額茶水費。

all.en: Client gifts and team meals fall outside the petty cash scope.
all.zh: 客戶禮品及團隊餐敘不在小額採購範圍內。

all.en: Such items must be processed via the standard expense reimbursement workflow.
all.zh: 該類項目須透過標準報銷流程處理。

all.en: Personal expenses are strictly ineligible regardless of amount.
all.zh: 個人費用不論金額一律不可受理。

all.en: Section B: Per-Transaction and Monthly Spending Limits
all.zh: B 節：單筆及每月支出上限

all.en: The per-transaction limit is set at 200 dollars including applicable taxes.
all.zh: 單筆上限為 200 美元，含稅在內。

all.en: Employees may submit up to five petty cash claims per calendar month.
all.zh: 每位員工每月最多可提報五筆小額採購。

all.en: Aggregate monthly reimbursement cannot exceed 700 dollars per employee.
all.zh: 每位員工每月報銷合計不得超過 700 美元。

all.en: Higher amounts require pre-approval from the department head.
all.zh: 超出金額者須事前取得部門主管核准。

all.en: Splitting a single purchase into smaller claims is strictly prohibited.
all.zh: 嚴禁將單一採購拆分為多筆申請。

all.en: Section C: Receipt Format and Documentation Requirements
all.zh: C 節：收據格式及佐證文件要求

all.en: Original receipts must be legible and clearly show the merchant name.
all.zh: 原始收據須字跡清晰並明確顯示商家名稱。

all.en: Receipts must also display the date, itemized amounts, and total.
all.zh: 收據亦須載明日期、逐項金額及總金額。

all.en: Handwritten receipts are accepted only if stamped by the merchant.
all.zh: 手寫收據僅在加蓋商家戳章情況下方可受理。

all.en: Digital receipts must be saved as PDF or PNG with a maximum size of 5 megabytes.
all.zh: 電子收據須存為 PDF 或 PNG 格式，檔案不得逾 5 MB。

all.en: Screenshots of email confirmations alone are insufficient documentation.
all.zh: 僅以電子郵件確認之截圖視為佐證不足。

all.en: Receipts in foreign currency must include a conversion calculation.
all.zh: 外幣收據須附換算計算。

all.en: The conversion should use the official rate on the date of purchase.
all.zh: 換算應採購買當日之官方匯率。

all.en: Section D: Submission Workflow and Approval Routing
all.zh: D 節：提交流程及簽核路徑

all.en: All petty cash claims must be submitted via the FinanceFlow portal.
all.zh: 所有小額採購申請皆須透過 FinanceFlow 入口網站提交。

all.en: Paper-based submissions will no longer be accepted after January 31st.
all.zh: 1 月 31 日後將不再受理紙本提交。

all.en: Claims must be submitted within fifteen calendar days of purchase.
all.zh: 申請須於採購日起十五個曆日內提交。

all.en: Late submissions will require a justification memo to the controller.
all.zh: 逾期申請須附理由說明書呈報財務主計。

all.en: The first-level approver is the employee's direct supervisor.
all.zh: 第一級核准人為員工之直屬主管。

all.en: Approvals are typically processed within two business days.
all.zh: 核准作業通常於兩個工作天內完成。

all.en: Reimbursements are deposited via the next available payroll cycle.
all.zh: 報銷款項將於下一可用薪資週期撥入。

all.en: Section E: Audit Sampling and Compliance Monitoring
all.zh: E 節：稽核抽樣及合規監控

all.en: A random sample of ten percent of claims is reviewed each month.
all.zh: 每月將隨機抽選 10% 之申請進行覆核。

all.en: Selected claims may be requested to provide additional clarification.
all.zh: 受抽申請可能被要求補充說明資料。

all.en: Repeated noncompliance may result in suspension of petty cash privileges.
all.zh: 重複違反規定可能導致暫停小額採購權限。

all.en: Fraudulent claims will trigger disciplinary action under the code of conduct.
all.zh: 不實申請將依員工行為準則啟動懲戒程序。

all.en: All audit logs are retained for seven years per record retention policy.
all.zh: 依紀錄保存政策，所有稽核日誌保存七年。

all.en: Section F: Frequently Asked Questions and Practical Examples
all.zh: F 節：常見問題及實務範例

all.en: Q: Can I combine multiple small purchases into one claim?
all.zh: 問：我可以將多筆小額採購合併為一筆申請嗎？

all.en: A: Yes, provided the combined amount stays under 200 dollars.
all.zh: 答：可以，惟合併金額仍須低於 200 美元。

all.en: Q: What if the merchant cannot provide a printed receipt?
all.zh: 問：若商家無法提供紙本收據怎麼辦？

all.en: A: A merchant-stamped handwritten receipt is acceptable.
all.zh: 答：經商家加蓋戳章之手寫收據可接受。

all.en: Q: How do I claim a purchase made on behalf of a colleague?
all.zh: 問：代同事採購之款項如何申請？

all.en: A: Submit under your name with a memo identifying the requesting colleague.
all.zh: 答：以本人名義提交並附說明書註明請購同事姓名。

all.en: Q: Are tips at meals reimbursable through petty cash?
all.zh: 問：用餐小費可否透過小額採購報銷？

all.en: A: Tips are not eligible under the revised petty cash policy.
all.zh: 答：依修訂後政策，小費不符合受理條件。

all.en: Section G: Contact Information and Further Assistance
all.zh: G 節：聯絡資訊及進階協助

all.en: For procedural questions, please contact admin-support at extension 6600.
all.zh: 如有流程相關疑問，請撥分機 6600 聯繫行政支援。

all.en: For system access issues, please open a ticket through ServiceNow.
all.zh: 如遇系統存取問題，請透過 ServiceNow 開單通報。

all.en: We thank everyone for adhering to the revised petty cash procedure.
all.zh: 感謝各位遵循修訂後小額採購流程。

all.en: Issued by Patricia Holloway, Director of Administrative Services
all.zh: 發布人：行政服務處總監 Patricia Holloway
